NOTE: Spelling-to-lemma overrides. Keys are canonical spellings (the output of normalizeSpelling, as they appear in vocab.spellings); values are the citation-form lemma string. The heuristic in inferLemma handles the bulk of regular inflections over the spelling vocabulary; this file covers what it cannot: suppletive forms (irregular verbs) and archaic conjugations. Extend this file on inspection of the generated table whenever the heuristic produces a wrong or opaque result.
